seoTitle: How to Link PayPal to Facebook Payouts (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to set PayPal as your receiving account for Facebook monetization earnings like Reels Play Bonus, Stars, and In-Stream Ads.
intro: Creators earning through Reels Play Bonus, Meta Stars, In-Stream Ads, or Subscriptions need a reliable payout method connected to their Professional Dashboard. This guide walks through linking PayPal as that receiving account. It's for creators who want a straightforward payout setup for their Facebook earnings.

steps.heading: Open your Professional Dashboard
steps.body: Switch to your Creator Page and click Professional Dashboard from the top navigation.

steps.heading: Go to Payouts
steps.body: In the left-hand Tools menu, click the Payouts link.

steps.heading: Open payment settings
steps.body: Click the gear icon or Settings option inside the Payouts panel to access your financial account properties.

steps.heading: Add or update your payment method
steps.body: Click Update or Add Payment Method, then select PayPal and click Link Method.

steps.heading: Authorize and confirm
steps.body: Log in through the secure PayPal overlay, pass any security checks, and click Agree and Connect to finish linking.

faq.question: How often does Facebook pay out through PayPal?
faq.answer: Payout schedules are typically monthly, and you can monitor upcoming windows from the Payouts panel.

faq.question: Do my tax details need to match my PayPal name?
faq.answer: Yes, keeping your legal tax information aligned with your PayPal profile helps avoid delayed or held payouts.

faq.question: Can I switch payout methods later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can return to the Payouts settings anytime to update or change your linked receiving account.

faq.question: What monetization features support this payout method?
faq.answer: Reels Play Bonus, Meta Stars, In-Stream Ads, and Subscriptions can all route earnings through your linked PayPal account.
